blocked_promotion_samples.raw_value: Public-safe operator notes on review-first research candidates
blocked_promotion_samples.reason: A source title is raw display text and must not become a canonical state label.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Keep the title in source/reference display fields only.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: A URL is an unstable source pointer and must not become a dashboard group key.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Keep the URL as raw display or a source pointer only.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: DOI-like or arbitrary identifiers are source pointers, not promoted evidence metadata keys.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Use as a raw identifier field only.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Provider IDs are raw integration trace strings and must not become operational tags.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Keep provider identifiers raw and local to the candidate/audit sample.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Workspace IDs are unstable trace identifiers and must not become task schema IDs.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Do not promote workspace IDs into task routing vocabulary.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Thread IDs are raw session traces and must not become task schema IDs.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Keep thread IDs raw or omit them from public fixtures.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Run IDs are raw provider/session traces and must not become operational tags.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Keep run IDs raw and non-canonical.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Raw session IDs are trace-local and must not become operational tags.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Use only as local trace context when separately authorized.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Arbitrary pasted user labels are not controlled vocabulary.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Review before any later ontology or label design.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Episode IDs are observation pointers and must not become promoted evidence metadata keys.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Keep episode IDs as audit/sample references only.

blocked_promotion_samples.reason: Demo DB refs are environment-local and must not become promoted evidence metadata keys.
blocked_promotion_samples.boundary_notes: Do not promote demo-local refs into durable metadata.

allowed_pointer_samples.reason: A source_ref_id may point within a local preview bundle.
allowed_pointer_samples.boundary_notes: It remains a local pointer, not a canonical state label.

allowed_pointer_samples.reason: Candidate IDs may link objects within a candidate bundle.
allowed_pointer_samples.boundary_notes: They remain local preview IDs unless a later durable record design says otherwise.

allowed_pointer_samples.reason: Repo paths may point to reviewed static artifacts.
allowed_pointer_samples.boundary_notes: A repo path pointer is not a newly invented state label.

allowed_pointer_samples.reason: Work IDs may point to existing work context.
allowed_pointer_samples.boundary_notes: A work ID pointer is not arbitrary research-derived vocabulary.

allowed_pointer_samples.raw_value: Public-safe operator notes on review-first research candidates
allowed_pointer_samples.reason: Raw titles may be displayed for reference.
allowed_pointer_samples.boundary_notes: Display does not promote the title to a canonical label.

allowed_pointer_samples.reason: Raw URLs may be displayed or reviewed as source refs.
allowed_pointer_samples.boundary_notes: Display does not promote the URL to a dashboard key or tag.

allowed_low_cardinality_samples.reason: review_status values are closed vocabulary in the type contract.
allowed_low_cardinality_samples.boundary_notes: Controlled review labels may be used as labels.

allowed_low_cardinality_samples.reason: epistemic_status values are closed vocabulary in the type contract.
allowed_low_cardinality_samples.boundary_notes: Controlled epistemic labels may be used as labels.

allowed_low_cardinality_samples.reason: delta_type values are closed vocabulary in the type contract.
allowed_low_cardinality_samples.boundary_notes: Controlled type literals may be used as static labels.

allowed_low_cardinality_samples.reason: promotion_readiness values are closed vocabulary in the type contract.
allowed_low_cardinality_samples.boundary_notes: Controlled readiness literals may be used as static labels.

allowed_low_cardinality_samples.reason: evidence_role values are closed vocabulary in the type contract.
allowed_low_cardinality_samples.boundary_notes: Controlled evidence-role literals may be used as static labels.

allowed_low_cardinality_samples.reason: tension_type values are closed vocabulary in the type contract.
allowed_low_cardinality_samples.boundary_notes: Controlled tension-type literals may be used as static labels.
